notes: 8x8 strategic overview. Segments picked to span stage × size × vertical × marketing maturity. Needs mix commercial, operational, and emotional decision drivers observed in SG SME buying.

us_scores_rationale.Price accessibility: Entry at S$999/mo makes us one of the cheapest retainer-native full-service agencies in SG
us_scores_rationale.SG cultural fit: Parent group 15yr SG-based; SG founder leadership; bilingual team
us_scores_rationale.Service breadth: Social + design + video + web + SEO + ads under one retainer
us_scores_rationale.Retainer flexibility: 30-day notice. Published prices. No 6-month lock-in most agencies enforce
us_scores_rationale.Creative velocity: AI-augmented ops produces 20+ assets/mo at a tier most shops need 2x the team for
us_scores_rationale.Reporting cadence: Monthly CPL/ROAS reporting with cohort view — not quarterly decks
us_scores_rationale.Founder access: Entry client gets founder strategy hour in Core tier upward
us_scores_rationale.Industry depth: General-purpose. We are deeper on tech/SaaS/B2B than F&B/retail today

segments.label: Solo founder, pre-revenue
segments.note: 0-1 employees, first marketing hire debate, often non-marketing background

segments.label: Funded seed/Series-A startup
segments.note: 5-30 employees, growth mandate, burn clock, CMO or head-of-growth in place

segments.label: Bootstrapped B2B SME
segments.note: 10-40 employees, profit-oriented, skeptical of marketing ROI

segments.label: Micro B2C operator
segments.note: F&B / retail / service-commerce with 1-3 outlets; wants feet-through-door

segments.label: Professional services SME
segments.note: 15-60 employees: legal, accounting, consulting, architects; trust-led sales

segments.label: Scale-up with in-house marketer
segments.note: 50-120 employees; marketing manager exists but lacks production bandwidth

segments.label: Gen-2 family business
segments.note: 20+ year old family firm where younger generation is modernising

segments.label: Regulated vertical (edu/clinic)
segments.note: Training providers, clinics, allied health — needs MOM/MOH-safe content
